command:
BASE="http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent"

check_result() {
  python3 -c "
import json, sys
d=json.load(open('/tmp/tst.json'))
if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
sent=d.get('sentinel',{})
result=sent.get('result','MISSING')
expected=sys.argv[1]
ok = result==expected
print(f'  sentinel.result  : {result}')
print(f'  sentinel.reason  : {sent.get(\"reason\",\"\")[:80]}')
print(f'  isGovernance     : {sent.get(\"isGovernanceRequest\")}')
print(f'  failedChecks     : {sent.get(\"failedChecks\")}')
print(f'  STATUS           : {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL (expected \"+expected+\")\"}')" "$1"
}

echo "=== TEST 1: router info (runtime - expect PASS) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"router info"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check_result "PASS"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 2: router health (runtime - expect PASS) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"router health"}' -o /tmp/tst.json
check_result "PASS"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 3: governance - missing approval (expect NEEDS_APPROVAL) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-test-003","baseline":"Phase8H-SentinelPrototype","rollbackPlan":"restore from baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Testing Phase 8I evaluation engine"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check_result "NEEDS_APPROVAL"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 4: governance - missing rollback (expect NEEDS_ROLLBACK) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-test-004","baseline":"Phase8H-SentinelPrototype","evidence":"Testing Phase 8I evaluation engine","approvalStatus":"APPROVED","approvalReference":"Jose-approved-Phase8I-test"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check_result "NEEDS_ROLLBACK"

echo ""
echo "=== TEST 5: governance - missing baseline (expect NEEDS_BASELINE) ==="
curl -s -X POST "$BASE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"message":"governance change request","changeId":"8I-test-005","rollbackPlan":"restore from baselines/production/router/","evidence":"Testing Phase 8I evaluation engine","approvalStatus":"APPROVED","approvalReference":"Jose-approved-Phase8I-test"}' \
  -o /tmp/tst.json
check_result "NEEDS_BASELINE"

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL SUMMARY ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request

BASE = 'http://192.168.0.191:5678/webhook/chatgpt-homelab-agent'
def post(data):
    req = urllib.request.Request(BASE, data=json.dumps(data).encode(),
        method='POST', headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as r:
        d = json.loads(r.read())
    if isinstance(d,list): d=d[0]
    return d.get('sentinel',{}).get('result','MISSING')

tests = [
    ('router info',         {'message':'router info'},                            'PASS'),
    ('router health',       {'message':'router health'},                          'PASS'),
    ('needs approval',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e'}, 'NEEDS_APPROVAL'),
    ('needs rollback',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','baseline':'b','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, 'NEEDS_ROLLBACK'),
    ('needs baseline',      {'message':'governance change request','changeId':'x','rollbackPlan':'r','evidence':'e','approvalStatus':'APPROVED'}, 'NEEDS_BASELINE'),
]

all_pass = True
for name, data, expected in tests:
    result = post(data)
    ok = result == expected
    all_pass = all_pass and ok
    print(f'  {name:30s} -> {result:20s} {\"PASS\" if ok else \"FAIL (expected \"+expected+\")\"}')

print()
print(f'  All tests PASS: {all_pass}')
print(f'  Phase 8I Complete: {all_pass}')
"
